name: Kedar Nanda
title: Senior Data Engineer | Data Platform Architect

experience.title: Sr Enterprise Data Architect/Data Engineer
base_bullets: Designed and implemented scalable, cloud-native data architectures to handle large-scale data processing systems, leveraging AWS services (S3, Lambda, Glue, Redshift) and Snowflake. This provided a highly efficient and reliable data processing and storage framework that supported the growing needs of the organization’s data analytics and reporting capabilities.

Built and optimized end-to-end ETL pipelines using PySpark, Apache Kafka, AWS Kinesis, and SQS, ensuring fault-tolerant, high-throughput, and low-latency data ingestion and processing. This helped streamline data flow and reduce bottlenecks across various data sources and systems, ensuring real-time processing of critical data.

Developed and deployed cloud-native data workflows using AWS Lambda and AWS Glue, enabling automatic scaling for both batch and real-time data ingestion. This reduced manual effort, improved efficiency, and lowered operational costs by eliminating the need for on-premise infrastructure while ensuring high availability and performance of the system.

Automated complex data transformations with dbt, creating scalable, repeatable, and maintainable transformations. This allowed for smoother data processing and more accurate reporting, significantly improving data integrity and reducing errors in downstream analytics processes.

Collaborated with cross-functional teams to design and implement high-performance data lakes on AWS S3 and Snowflake, enabling faster and more efficient query execution and enhancing the overall data storage architecture. This allowed the company to better manage large datasets while ensuring optimized data processing speeds.

Integrated advanced machine learning models and AI-powered systems, using GPT-4, Hugging Face, and LangChain to create intelligent data querying and processing capabilities. This allowed business users to make more data-driven decisions through automated analysis and improved forecasting.

Designed and built custom APIs using FastAPI and Flask to provide seamless access to curated datasets, enabling internal business systems and third-party applications to easily integrate with the data platform. This improved system interoperability and supported multiple applications across different departments.

Led efforts to optimize data pipelines by conducting regular performance reviews and implementing changes that resulted in a substantial reduction in processing time. This optimization contributed to the faster delivery of data insights, enhancing the decision-making process across the organization.

Utilized containerization technologies like Docker and Kubernetes to deploy and scale data engineering solutions in cloud environments, ensuring a consistent and scalable deployment process. This not only improved the maintainability of data engineering workflows but also simplified the integration of new services and systems into the architecture.

Implemented comprehensive performance tuning strategies for large-scale data workloads by optimizing data access patterns and query execution. This significantly enhanced system throughput, reducing latency in processing and improving user satisfaction with faster data access.

Instituted automated data quality checks and validation routines, ensuring that data across all systems met strict consistency and reliability standards. These automated checks reduced the risk of data errors and enhanced the trustworthiness of data-driven decisions within the business.

Collaborated closely with the DevOps team to integrate data pipeline deployment into a fully automated CI/CD pipeline. This ensured faster, more reliable delivery of data engineering solutions, allowing for seamless updates and deployment without downtime or disruption to business operations.

Optimized data storage solutions by leveraging AWS S3 lifecycle policies and Redshift Spectrum. This strategy helped manage cost-effective data storage solutions, ensuring the long-term scalability of the data architecture while maintaining fast data retrieval times and minimizing unnecessary storage costs.

Worked on data security and compliance initiatives to meet regulatory standards such as HIPAA and GDPR. This included implementing encryption, data masking, and access control protocols, ensuring that sensitive data was protected while maintaining the integrity and privacy of information across the platform.

Led the migration of legacy on-premise data systems to a modern cloud infrastructure, overseeing the planning, execution, and validation of the migration process. The successful migration ensured that the company could take full advantage of cloud capabilities, enhancing scalability, flexibility, and data accessibility.

experience.title: Technical Architect/Data Engineer
base_bullets: Architected scalable enterprise data platforms leveraging Snowflake, AWS Redshift, Apache Spark, and cloud-native services, enabling high-performance analytics and processing of large-scale structured and unstructured datasets.
Designed and developed robust ETL pipelines using Spark, Python, and AWS services, significantly improving data ingestion performance, transformation efficiency, and end-to-end pipeline reliability.

Built and maintained real-time streaming architectures using Apache Kafka and AWS Kinesis, enabling continuous ingestion and processing of high-velocity data streams for real-time analytics use cases.

Implemented workflow orchestration and scheduling using Apache Airflow, Autosys, and Control-M, ensuring reliable execution, monitoring, and dependency management of complex distributed data pipelines.
Developed and optimized data integration workflows using Alteryx and Apache NiFi, streamlining ingestion and transformation processes across multiple heterogeneous data sources and systems.
Integrated machine learning algorithms including regression, KMeans clustering, and Random Forest within data pipelines to enable predictive analytics and advanced data processing capabilities.
Designed and implemented scalable RESTful APIs using Flask and FastAPI to expose data services and enable seamless integration with downstream applications and analytics systems.
Utilized Pandas and NumPy extensively for data transformation, enrichment, and quality validation across large datasets within distributed data processing environments.
Optimized database performance using advanced SQL tuning, indexing strategies, and partitioning techniques, significantly reducing query latency and improving analytical workload performance.
Managed and scaled distributed NoSQL databases including Cassandra and DynamoDB to support high-throughput, low-latency applications and large-scale data storage requirements.
Led containerization and deployment efforts using Docker and Kubernetes, enabling scalable, portable, and efficient deployment of data engineering and analytics applications.
Developed interactive business intelligence dashboards using Tableau, enabling stakeholders to derive insights from complex datasets and improve data-driven decision-making.

experience.title: Senior Software Engineer
base_bullets: Developed and maintained scalable data processing applications using AWS S3, Oracle PL/SQL, and Apache Spark, improving system performance, reliability, and data processing throughput.
Built and automated ETL pipelines using Python and Autosys, reducing manual intervention, improving workflow efficiency, and enabling consistent and reliable data processing operations.
Leveraged Pandas and NumPy for data transformation, validation, and preprocessing tasks, supporting analytics workflows and ensuring data quality across multiple data sources.
Optimized SQL queries and data models using indexing, partitioning, and query tuning techniques, significantly improving data retrieval speed and reporting performance.
Implemented data validation frameworks and monitoring mechanisms to ensure data accuracy, consistency, and reliability across complex data processing workflows.
Designed scalable database schemas and data architectures to support increasing data volumes and evolving business requirements.
Automated reporting and data delivery workflows, enabling faster and more accurate generation of business insights and operational reports.
Integrated cloud-based data solutions into legacy systems, enhancing scalability, accessibility, and performance of existing data infrastructure.
Collaborated closely with clients and stakeholders to design, develop, and deliver data-driven solutions aligned with business needs and technical requirements.

experience.title: Software Engineer
base_bullets: Developed enterprise-grade applications using Oracle PL/SQL and AWS S3, supporting high-volume financial transaction processing systems with strong performance and reliability requirements.
Designed and implemented ETL pipelines for financial data processing, improving data availability, consistency, and accuracy for reporting and analytics purposes.
Automated data workflows using scheduling tools such as Autosys, reducing manual effort and improving operational efficiency and reliability of data processing systems.
Optimized SQL queries and database performance for large-scale transactional systems, ensuring fast query execution and efficient resource utilization.
Enhanced reporting systems to improve accessibility, usability, and accuracy of financial data for business users and decision-makers.
Ensured high availability, reliability, and performance of database systems in mission-critical financial environments with strict uptime requirements.
Supported and maintained large-scale data processing systems, ensuring consistent uptime, performance stability, and efficient issue resolution.

experience.title: Asst Systems Engineer
base_bullets: Developed and maintained enterprise applications using Oracle PL/SQL and Unix shell scripting, supporting large-scale data processing and business operations systems.
Assisted in designing and implementing ETL workflows and reporting systems, enabling efficient data integration and improved reporting capabilities.
Automated data processing and operational tasks, improving efficiency, reducing manual effort, and enhancing system reliability.
Supported system integration, troubleshooting, and performance optimization initiatives across multiple applications and data systems.
Participated in full SDLC lifecycle including design, development, testing, and deployment, contributing to delivery of high-quality software and data solutions.
Collaborated with cross-functional teams to ensure seamless delivery of data-driven solutions aligned with business and technical requirements.
